title: Autopilot Host Command Configuration
description: Host launcher command override. SECURITY WARNING: the configured command runs headlessly with no approval prompt; use only trusted binaries. An untrusted build/test command can plant this file and persist to the next host run.

command.description: Executable name or absolute path for host-mode autopilot invocations.

args.description: Static arguments appended to each host-mode autopilot invocation.
